---
title: "\'School Sketches\'"
---

## \'School Sketches\'

**Author:** Emily Taylor
**Date:** 1855-1856
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (July 1855-September 1856)

### Notes

This was a series of fictionalized articles on schoolteaching, the first two and the fifth cast as a conversation between a father and his children.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
